creator: dclarke@blastwave.org
text: Yes, thank you and I do know that I am well out into the wilds with this and to be fair it is fun to exerpiment with a new platform. I am working along through various packages in ports and hitting more than a few snags. Such is life out on the edge and that is fine. I also have done some work with ppc64 and to be fair that seems to be working well. I am going to do a build of gcc 10.2.0 outside of ports and see how that goes and then I'll come back to ports and give that a try. This will take days of course.
